name: framework
description: The GAD framework itself at vendor/get-anything-done/ — source + planning

entries.role: agent instructions specific to editing the GAD submodule (lane rules, diff hygiene)
live framework state — next-action pointer and state log
framework failure log — tooling traps, bad dispatch paths, Windows-specific blockers
documentation map — which docs exist and where they sink
framework-level GAD config (mode, features, workflow flags)

directories.role: CLI entry points — gad.cjs dispatcher + gad-config.cjs
modular command modules — one file per command family, auto-discovered by _loader.cjs
shared runtime library — readers, writers, helpers, schema parsers
built-in GAD skills (Markdown frontmatter, invokable by gad skill run)
canonical planning file-tree schemas (project.json, monorepo.json, framework.json)
project init templates — project.md, roadmap.md, requirements.md, config.json, etc.
unit and integration tests (node --test)
eval projects for regression testing agent behavior
compiled docs output (output of gad docs compile)
reference docs — communication-style, agent-lanes, workflow conventions
workflow spec documents (gad, bare, emergent patterns)
framework planning artifacts
per-phase context and artifacts
per-task JSON files — canonical task registry
agent notes and findings
framework research artifacts
cross-agent handoff queue
candidate phase briefs not yet committed to roadmap
formal specifications for complex subsystems
workflow evolution artifacts (emergent patterns, retrospectives)
proto-skill development artifacts and battery results
context framework development artifacts (phase 42.4)
gad team runtime state
archived phases and superseded artifacts
